nav.confirmQuit: Are you sure you want to quit? Any unsaved progress will be lost.

hero.subtitle: The first clinical-grade neurological assessment platform delivered through a premium, digital experience. Powered by Neuro-Linguistic AI for 94.2% detection accuracy.

status.notStarted: Start your assessments to build your cognitive profile.
status.allDone: All assessments complete! View your full report.

dashboard.completeToGenerate: Complete assessments to generate your score

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your clinical profile and diagnostic preferences.
settings.languageDesc: Changes all text, questions, and options instantly
settings.privacyDesc: All voice and biometric data is encrypted locally
settings.resetProgressDesc: Clear completed test data so you can retake all assessments. Your settings will be preserved.
settings.purgeHistoryDesc: Permanently deletes ALL data including settings, test results, and preferences. This cannot be reversed.

hub.title: Cognitive Battery
hub.subtitle: Complete all modules below to generate your biometric-grade risk report. Progress is persisted automatically.

wordRecall.desc: Memory retention test using randomized word pools.

patternRecognition.desc: Identify the missing link in visual pattern sequences.

numberSequence.desc: Determine the missing number in complex mathematical series.

mathReasoning.desc: Solve short story-based arithmetic problems under pressure.

reactionTime.desc: Measures your motor-cognitive response time in milliseconds.

videoComprehension.desc: Watch a short film and answer episodic memory questions.

voiceAnalysis.title: Voice Analysis
voiceAnalysis.desc: Advanced AI detects hesitation and speech speed markers.

videoAnalysis.title: Video Analysis
videoAnalysis.desc: 30-second AI facial tracking for motor and affective biomarkers.

wordRecall.title: Word Recall
wordRecall.instructions: You will be shown 5 words one by one.
wordRecall.recall_instr: Try to remember as many as possible.
wordRecall.distraction_note: A short pause helps test long-term retention.

patternRecognition.title: Pattern Recognition
patternRecognition.instructions: Identify the next shape in the visual sequence.

numberSequence.title: Number Sequence
numberSequence.instructions: Determine the mathematical logic and find the missing number.

mathReasoning.title: Math Reasoning
mathReasoning.instructions: Solve these everyday mathematical scenarios to test cognitive processing.

questions.q1: If you buy 3 apples for $1.50 each and pay with a $10 bill, how much change do you receive?
questions.q2: A train leaves at 3:15 PM and travels for 2 hours and 45 minutes. What time does it arrive?
questions.q3: Subtract 7 from 100, then subtract 7 from that result. What is the final number?

reactionTime.title: Reaction Time
reactionTime.instructions: Click the screen as fast as you can when it turns green.

videoComprehension.title: Video Comprehension
videoComprehension.instructions: Watch the video carefully. You will then be asked 5 questions about what you observed. Pay attention to people, settings, mood, and movement.
videoComprehension.watchNote: Watch at least 10 seconds to proceed
videoComprehension.fallbackText: A person is walking through a busy outdoor area. There are several vehicles moving along a road nearby. The scene is bright and sunny with clear skies. Some trees and natural scenery are visible in the background. The overall pace of the scene is energetic and lively.

questions.q: How many people did you observe in the scene?
What was the primary setting of the video?
What was the overall mood or pace of the scene?
What time of day did the scene appear to take place?
Which element was most prominent in the scene?

videoAnalysis.title: Video Biomarker Analysis
videoAnalysis.setupDesc: Our advanced AI clinical engine tracks micro-expressions and motor stability markers to create a neuro-cognitive biometric profile.
videoAnalysis.instructions: Keep your face centered and look directly at the screen. Focus your gaze on the yellow circle when it appears.

results.title: Clinical Report
results.riskDescription: This score is a weighted aggregation of 7 cognitive dimensions. A score above 55 indicates a high probability of early-stage cognitive decline.
results.recommendation: Clinical Recommendation: We strongly advise scheduling a consultation with a neurologist or cognitive specialist within the next 30 days to establish a definitive medical baseline.
results.shareDoctorDesc: This report is formatted for clinical review. Generate a secure, HIPAA-compliant link to send directly to your healthcare provider.
results.summaryText: Based on the comprehensive assessment completed today, the NeuroLoop diagnostic engine has classified your cognitive profile as {{risk}} for early-stage neurocognitive decline.

dimension1.title: Episodic & Working Memory
dimension1.desc: Marked difficulty in retaining new visual information and verbal lists after distraction.

dimension2.title: Processing Speed & Phonation
dimension2.desc: Motor-cognitive reaction times are slower than expected, matching hesitation markers found in the Voice Analysis module.

profile.noTests: No assessments completed yet. Start your first test!

auth.loginSubtitle: Log in to track your cognitive health progress.
auth.registerSubtitle: Join NeuroLoop to start your cognitive assessment.
auth.registerDesc: Get started with your free cognitive assessment. No credit card required.
auth.terms: By creating an account you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
auth.aiAssessment: AI-powered cognitive assessment platform for early dementia detection.

howItWorks.title: Clinical Assessment in 3 Simple Steps
howItWorks.subtitle: Our AI processes 6 cognitive dimensions in under 20 minutes to provide a transparent, medical-grade assessment of your brain health.

step1.title: Secure Registration
step1.desc: Create your clinical profile to ensure all data is securely encrypted and HIPAA-compliant from the start.

step2.title: Complete Battery
step2.desc: 6 scientifically validated tests covering memory, pattern recognition, and vocal biomarkers.

step3.title: Biometric Report
step3.desc: Receive a detailed, clinical-grade report with clear explanations and personalized next-step recommendations.

clinicalAccuracy.title: Clinical Accuracy
clinicalAccuracy.desc: 94.2% detection accuracy validated by extensive neurological research and real-world results.

privacyFirst.title: Privacy First
privacyFirst.desc: All voice and biometric data is stored locally and encrypted. We never share your health information.

multiLanguage.title: Multi-Language Support
multiLanguage.desc: Full support for English, Hindi, and Telugu, ensuring accessibility for diverse patient populations.

elderly.title: Elderly Patients
elderly.desc: Early detection for better long-term outcomes and peace of mind for those at risk.

caregivers.title: Caregivers
caregivers.desc: Monitor your loved ones' cognitive health with objective, data-driven insights and reporting.

neurologists.title: Neurologists
neurologists.desc: Use as a preliminary screening tool to establish baseline cognitive metrics for your patients.

biometrics.title: Biometric Biomarkers
biometrics.desc: Our clinical battery is based on the Mini-Cog and MoCA frameworks, enhanced by high-resolution motor-cognitive reaction timers.

vocal.title: Vocal Prosody Analysis
vocal.desc: NeuroLoop uses Natural Language Processing (NLP) to detect paralinguistic markers such as increased hesitation and changes in speech tempo.

validation.title: Research-Backed Validation
validation.desc: Our algorithms are trained on diverse datasets of both neurotypical and cognitively impaired individuals, ensuring high sensitivity.

about.title: Our Mission
about.subtitle: NeuroLoop Insight was born from a simple belief: that every individual deserves access to clinical-grade cognitive monitoring.

democratizing.title: Democratizing Detection
democratizing.desc: We leverage edge computing and advanced AI to bring the power of a neurology lab to any browser.

privacy.title: Patient-Centric Privacy
privacy.desc: Your brain data is the most personal information you own. NeuroLoop is built with zero-knowledge principles.

riskClassification.title: Clinical-Grade Risk Classification
riskClassification.subtitle: Our proprietary algorithm weighs multiple cognitive dimensions to generate a unified risk score.
riskClassification.low: Cognitive function is stable. Continue brain-healthy habits.
riskClassification.moderate: Minor cognitive slowing detected. Monitoring recommended.
riskClassification.high: Significant decline detected. Consult a neurologist immediately.

videoMemory.title: World-First: Video Memory Assessment
videoMemory.subtitle: Watch a short scene, then answer questions about what you observed. Tests episodic memory — one of the earliest indicators.

cta.title: Start Your Assessment Today
cta.subtitle: The most advanced cognitive screening platform available at your fingertips.

david.text: The voice analysis tool caught a slight hesitancy my doctor missed. Caught it early, thankful for NeuroLoop.

sarah.text: Beautiful interface that doesn't feel clinical. The video comprehension test is surprisingly engaging and tough!

james.text: I've started recommending this platform to my at-risk patients for baseline monitoring. The metrics are remarkably accurate.

footer.desc: Advanced AI-powered cognitive health assessment platform. Early detection for a better tomorrow.
